mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, u.follow_count, u.fan_count, uf.create_time AS follow_time FROM user_follow uf JOIN user u ON uf.following_id = u.user_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, u.follow_count, u.fan_count, uf.create_time AS follow_time FROM user_follow uf JOIN user u ON uf.follower_id = u.user_id WHERE uf.following_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC
